comment: Felt right at home. Quiet neighborhood, porch was perfect for morning journaling. Host was responsive and warm.
Lovely home in a beautiful neighborhood. Close to everything I needed for the conference. Will definitely return.
Such a peaceful spot. Perfect for a long weekend away. The views from the porch were worth every penny.
Clean and affordable, close to campus. A little noisy on weekend nights but the host was great.
Exactly what I needed for a CPE intensive week. Quiet, clean, easy walk to the venue. Carol is a wonderful host.
This lakeside cottage is a true gift. I spent three mornings on the dock with my journal and coffee. Heaven.
Good location for the conference, comfortable room, friendly host. Would stay again.
I came here needing quiet and came home renewed. The treehouse feel is unlike anything. No wifi - perfect.
Good value near the APC conference. Host was accommodating. A bit dated but very clean.
Functional and affordable. Parking was easy. Wouldn't write home about it but it did the job.
That garden suite is a hidden gem. Sitting outside with sweet tea in the evening - I didn't want to leave.
Beautiful Victorian near the symposium. Felt like staying at a friend's house. James is a superb host.
Decent spot in Midtown. I was visiting a friend nearby so this was convenient. Clean and quiet.
The Garden District is something else. This home fit the neighborhood perfectly. Great communication from the host.
Nice and affordable. Patricia was gracious and left a welcome note. Good base for hospital visits in the area.
